case_title: CHARLES K TU et al VS. PILADE FLAVIO CORSI

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-15-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CORSI, PILADE FLAVIO (PILADE FLAVIO CORSI DBA C & C PROFESSIONAL APPLIANCE REPAIR)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CORSI, PILADE FLAVIO (PILADE FLAVIO CORSI DBA C & C PROFESSIONAL APPLIANCE REPAIR)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAY 18, 2010 ORDERED DESTROYED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TU, CHARLES K TU, PATTY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CORSI, PILADE FLAVIO (PILADE FLAVIO CORSI DBA C & C PROFESSIONAL APPLIANCE REPAIR) STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS FOR A CLAIM OF NEGLIGENT INSTALLATION OF COUNTERTOP IS 2 YEARS. PLAINTIFF WAS ON NOTICE OF PROBLEM IN JANUARY 2005. CLAIM IS TIME BARRED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $585.00 FILED BY TU, CHARLES K TU, PATTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORSI, PILADE FLAVIO (PILADE FLAVIO CORSI DBA C & C PROFESSIONAL APPLIANCE REPAIR) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-22-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SC-108: REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED. MAILED COPIES TO ALL PARTIES.
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER IS "DENIED". COPY OF THE SAME MAILED TO PARTIES.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-22-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM RUSSELL DAVIS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF LEFT WITHOUT HIS EXHIBITS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
